nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:

# Check all non-background objects
print("\nAll objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ['O', 'w']:  # Exclude orange background and light gray
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(p[0] for p in b)}-{max(p[0] for p in b)}, cols {min(p[1] for p in b)}-{max(p[1] for p in b)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
